title: Ensure for loop stop conditions are invariant
description: A for loop termination condition should test the loop counter against an invariant value that does not change during the execution of the loop. This rule tracks three types of non-invariant termination conditions: When the loop counters are updated in the body of the for loop, When the termination condition depends on a method call, When the termination condition depends on an object property since such properties could change during the execution of the loop.
recommendation: Test the loop counter against an invariant value that does not change during the execution of the loop.
impact: Makes the program logic easier to understand and maintain.

checks.message: Test the loop counter against an invariant value that does not change during the execution of the loop.
